mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SHANXI_ANCIENT_STUDENT (SID, SNAME, GENDER, CLASSNAME,IS_DELETE) VALUES (#{sid}, #{sname}, #{gender},#{classname},0)
mapper.select: SELECT SID, SNAME, GENDER, CLASSNAME, IS_DELETE FROM SHANXI_ANCIENT_STUDENT WHERE SID = #{sid} AND IS_DELETE = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE STUDENT_BUILD_REL SET SID = #{sid}, BUILD_ID = #{buildId}, SCORE = #{score}, VISIT_TIME = #{visitTime} WHERE REL_ID = #{relId}
UPDATE SHANXI_ANCIENT_STUDENT SET SNAME = #{sname}, GENDER = #{gender}, CLASSNAME = #{classname}, IS_DELETE = #{isDelete} WHERE SID = #{sid}
